have candidate_dvd_four : ∀ n : ℕ, 10 < n → (⨆ m : Fin n, (m : ℕ) + ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 m) ≤ n + 2 → 4 ∣ n := by

        rw [Nat.mem_divisors]
        constructor

          · exact one_dvd a
          · use b
            omega
          · use 2
            omega
          · exact dvd_rfl
        · omega
      have hba : b ≠ a := by omega
      have h2b : 2 ≠ b := by omega

      have h1a : 1 ≠ a := by omega
      have h2a : 2 ≠ a := by omega
